visits.note: Patient presents with 3-month history of fatigue and polyuria. Physical exam reveals BP 140/90 mmHg and BMI 32 kg/m2. HbA1c 8.1%, LDL 160 mg/dL. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension. Medications: Metformin 500mg BID, Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Patient reports worsening fatigue and increased urination. BP 150/95 mmHg. HbA1c 7.5%, LDL 140 mg/dL. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Dyslipidemia. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily.

Patient reports decreased fatigue but increased shortness of breath. BP 130/80 mmHg. HbA1c 6.8%, LDL 110 mg/dL. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Dyslipidemia, Heart Failure. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily, Furosemide 20mg daily.

Patient reports improved symptoms but elevated creatinine. BP 125/75 mmHg. HbA1c 6.2%, LDL 100 mg/dL. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Dyslipidemia, Heart Failure, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 1000mg BID, Lisinopril 20mg daily, Atorvastatin 20mg daily, Furosemide 40mg daily, Epoetin alfa 10,000 units weekly.
